experiment: b-cov define-lane (external benchmark define-checkability census, bead kernel-of-truth-hu10)
candidate: genus-differentia define-op — EXTERNAL κ_B BREADTH lane (leg-3 mapper-parse census over Tier-A definitional benchmarks; the counterpart to the internal define-op-census leg-1/2 substrate count)
_placement_note: kot-assess/1 record at registry/assessments/b-cov-define-lane.json, the interpretation of a Tier-0 DETERMINISTIC-COUNTING census run by Opus (experiment-runner) on 2026-07-10, branch opus/f2b-replicate-rightsize. This is NOT a frozen experiment: there is NO frozen SAP and NO verdict object (grep b-cov in registry/experiments + registry/results-log returns nothing by design). Backing is the honesty-guard tooling-measurement rail: committed census-summary.json + RUN-LOG.md + reproduce commands + shard/index shas + a positive-control instrument-validity check. The RUN-LOG asserts MEASURED-exploratory counts only and explicitly forbids verdict/interpretation/extrapolation; the meaning of those counts is decided HERE and only here. This record is the EXTERNAL-BENCHMARK counterpart to registry/assessments/define-op-census.json (internal 0.7710): the same define-op, the same endorsed {go,so,mondo} substrate, now with the binding THIRD leg (mapper parse of real benchmark stems) attached and MEASURED.
assessor_binding: FABLE interpretive assessment per docs/next/opus-execution-practices.md practice 4 and the kern Fable/Opus execution split: Opus ran census.py + positive_control.py and reported mechanical counts, the §C5 breakdown, the mapper parse histogram, and a diagnosed mechanical cause; what the 0.0000 MEANS for the efficiency-thesis breadth story, the coverage gradient's external endpoint, and the feasibility verdict is decided here. Scope discipline: registry/assessments/b-cov-define-lane.json + registry/assumptions.jsonl (my reserved ASM-0220..0239 block, append-only) ONLY. No experiment, verdict, correction, engine, census-runner, or other agent's file modified; audit-status.jsonl is central custody (reported to the coordinator, not touched here); no kb-sync (assessments are not kb-mapped).

positive_control.note: POSITIVE CONTROL: PASS — GO:0000018 'which term means biological regulation that regulates DNA recombination' parses → §C5 n==1 → engine DEFINE-MATCH True; so the pipeline yields a checkable WHEN one exists. The benchmark 0.0000 is a REAL MEASURED null, not a broken harness.

internal_contrast.note: the INTERNAL define-op-census: 0.7710 define-checkability of the self-authored substrate (legs 1-2). This external census is the same op with leg 3 attached; the pair is the load-bearing contrast (self-authored substrate 0.7710 → external benchmarks 0.0000).

pins.grammar: kot-query/1 define-op (two-shape DEFINE / DEFINE-MATCH); §C5 uniqueness filter [ASM-0131]

measurement_refs.reproduce: python3 poc/b-cov-define-lane/fetch_mmlu.py && python3 poc/b-cov-define-lane/build_define_index.py && python3 poc/b-cov-define-lane/census.py && python3 poc/b-cov-define-lane/positive_control.py
measurement_refs.population: 7 RUNNABLE Tier-A definitional benchmarks, 1,550 items total: OpenBookQA-test (500, in-repo Apache-2.0, HF rev 388097e) + 6 def-MMLU biomedical subjects from canonical cais/mmlu MIT (college_biology 144, college_chemistry 100, medical_genetics 100, anatomy 135, clinical_knowledge 265, nutrition 306 = 1,050). WiC NOT RUN (canonical pilehvar/wic HTTP-401; reported as a data gap, not a zero).
measurement_refs.engine: define-op over the endorsed {go,so,mondo} substrate; engine definitional index at run: defn_licensed 72,839 / defn_resolved 13,824 / distinct_definition_keys 13,824 / internal_collision_keys(n≥2) 0.

_surprise_note: No prereg claim.md / registered prior exists (Tier-0 exploratory census), so no surprise-* tag is licensed. Informally the 0.0000 is the DOWNSIDE of the pattern the design memo predicted verbatim: docs/design-kot-query-define-op.md §4 declared the WiC/def-MMLU κ_B yield 'a projection, not a measured quantity', that 'WiC is general-vocabulary and mostly NOT biomedical, so its define-checkable yield may be small or ~0' [EXTRAPOLATION: ASM-0019, load_bearing:false], and that even the biomedical def-MMLU subjects (anatomy) needed 'the CL/UBERON unblock'. The measured 0.0000 lands at the extreme of that projected downside — and adds a SECOND, larger cause the memo under-weighted: the template-shape gap (leg 3 itself), which dominates even the biomedical subjects that would have been in-domain had the templates matched. On-trajectory with the memo's stated scope honesty; the magnitude (all-seven-zero) is the informative surprise-adjacent datum, recorded in interpretation, not a surprise flag.

interpretation.headline: MEASURED-exploratory: the kernel's define-op currently makes ~0% of standard external definitional-benchmark items DEFINE-checkable — κ_B^engine = 0.0000 (0/1,550) on all 7 runnable Tier-A benchmarks (OpenBookQA-test + 6 def-MMLU biomedical subjects). This is the EXTERNAL-BENCHMARK END of the kernel's coverage gradient (self-authored ~1.0 / internal define-op-census 0.7710 → external benchmarks 0.0000): a MEASURED bound on EFFICIENCY-thesis BREADTH for the define lane on this slice. It is decisively NOT an engine failure — the positive control PASSED (a well-formed define stem yields §C5 n==1 → DEFINE-MATCH True), and §C5 dropped NOTHING because nothing reached the candidate population. The 0.0000 is the compound of TWO distinct, separately-named gaps at the binding third (leg-3) checkability leg: (a) a TEMPLATE-SHAPE gap — the mapper's closed define-templates fit almost no benchmark MCQ/cloze stem (no-template dominates: 1,497/1,550) — which DOMINATES; and (b) an ENDORSEMENT-COVERAGE gap — only {go,so,mondo} carry a definitional endorsement, so anatomy/cell items whose terms live in the minted-but-un-endorsed CL/UBERON/PO/PATO/CHEBI shards are outside the licensed set BY CONSTRUCTION. Each gap has a named resolution path. This is an exploratory, biomedical-skewed slice: it INFORMS the breadth story and does NOT gate the feasibility verdict.
interpretation.measured_read: MEASURED-exploratory: κ_B^engine = 0.0000 on every one of the 7 runnable benchmarks; N_checkable(§C5 n==1) = 0 on all. Aggregate parse histogram over 1,550 items: 1,497 no-template (96.6%), 52 slot-unresolved (the TERM span is a whole clause, not a single onto-obo label — e.g. OBQA 'what is the best way to guess a babies eye color'), 1 define-retrieve (clinical_knowledge #101: parsed what-is, TERM resolved to one licensed onto-obo concept, but that concept carries no logicalDefinition → engine ERR_NO_DEFINITION). §C5 breakdown is 0/0/0 (n==0 no-match / n==1 checkable / n≥2 collision-dropped) on every benchmark: no item reached the §C5 candidate-bearing population, so the uniqueness filter dropped nothing — the 0.0000 is upstream of §C5, at legs 3 (parse) and 2 (endorsement licence), not at the collision filter. Internal_collision_keys(n≥2) = 0 in the engine index, so §C5 has no collision to drop even in principle at this substrate. INSTRUMENT VALIDITY: positive_control.py feeds three questions that DO target an endorsed definition (GO:0000018) and gets candidate-parse → §C5 n==1 → DEFINE-MATCH True / DEFINE-retrieve answer; POSITIVE CONTROL: PASS. Per-item instrument-validity (census predicate n==1 ⟺ engine DEFINE-MATCH true) had 0 disagreements (0 n==1 items existed to check). The 0.0000 is therefore a MEASURED absence of define-template-shaped, substrate-resolving benchmark items, not a harness failure.

two_gap_diagnosis.gap_a_template_shape: [MEASURED-exploratory, DOMINANT] The mapper's closed define-templates (what is X / define X / the definition of X / is X a G that R F / X is defined as G that R F / which term means G that R F) matched almost no benchmark stem: 1,497/1,550 items are no-template. Standard MCQ/cloze benchmark stems are not surface-shaped like a define question, so leg 3 (parse into the closed define query) fails before endorsement or §C5 are ever consulted. This is the binding third leg the internal 0.7710 census explicitly did NOT touch, now MEASURED — and it is where the mechanism dies on this slice. Resolution path = mapper template expansion (defineTemplates.ts / parseDefineQuestion) to recognise benchmark-shaped definitional stems; a Fable design call, NOT improvised here.
two_gap_diagnosis.gap_b_endorsement_coverage: [MEASURED-exploratory, structural] Only {go,so,mondo} carry a definitional endorsement today; CL / UBERON / PO / PATO / CHEBI are minted-on-disk but UN-ENDORSED, so anatomy/cell items whose terms live in those shards are OUTSIDE the licensed set BY CONSTRUCTION (exactly the 'CL/UBERON unblock' the design memo §4 named as the precondition for the anatomy subject's yield). This gap is real but SECONDARY on this slice: gap (a) suppresses the population before endorsement is even reached, so closing (b) alone would move nothing until the templates match. Resolution path = author definitional endorsements for CL/UBERON/PO/PATO/CHEBI; a governance act (endorsement subject convention still UNPINNED, __PENDING_FABLE_SUBJECT_PIN__), NOT improvised here.
two_gap_diagnosis.keep_separate: [MEASURED discipline] The two gaps are distinct and must not be conflated: (a) is a leg-3 NL/mapper-parse gap (fixable by template expansion, records-only, no ingestion), (b) is a leg-2 licensing gap (fixable by an endorsement act over already-minted shards). The parse histogram shows (a) dominates (96.6% no-template). Neither is an engine defect (positive control PASS); both have named routes.

coverage_gradient_placement.gradient: self-authored internal define-op ~1.0 (GO 1.0, SO 1.0)  >  internal define-op-census aggregate 0.7710  >  friendly-NL m0b 0.3542 (molecules-v0)  >  EXTERNAL define-benchmark κ_B^engine 0.0000 (this census)  ≈  proposition roll-up ~0.006  ≈  Mathlib ~0.000
coverage_gradient_placement.where_0p0000_sits: [MEASURED, in scope] This census supplies the EXTERNAL-BENCHMARK ENDPOINT of the gradient that the internal define-op-census (0.7710) could only place at the self-authored end. The self-authored substrate is 0.7710 checkable (GO/SO complete); the SAME op, SAME substrate, pointed at external benchmark items through the binding third leg, is 0.0000. The ~4-orders-of-magnitude fall from 0.7710 to 0.0000 IS the empirical form of the three-legs discipline: the drop happens entirely at the binding third leg (external item → closed grammar), plus the endorsement-coverage boundary. The internal-substrate completeness number provably could NOT upper-bound the external point — and here the external point is now DIRECTLY MEASURED at ~0, confirming the monotone-decreasing shape rather than inferring it.
coverage_gradient_placement.framing_caveat: [STIPULATED: ASM-0220, load_bearing:false] The gradient — even now with both ends MEASURED — is a cross-instrument QUALITATIVE framing device: its points measure NON-COMMENSURABLE quantities (internal define-op resolvability of self-authored records; content-word vocabulary membership; external benchmark define-checkability under a closed mapper grammar) on DIFFERENT corpora with DIFFERENT denominators. It licenses ONLY the placement of 0.0000 at the external-benchmark end and the negative/monotone inference; it NEVER licenses interpolation between points or a single decay-law claim. No conclusion here rests on the gradient being a real single curve; the scope bounds rest on the independently-MEASURED three-legs discipline and the positive-control validity.

efficiency_thesis_breadth_read.frame: [READ] The efficiency thesis is ALIVE-NARROW (feasibility-synthesis.md §4). Its breadth axis is κ_B: how much of a benchmark the kernel can even ATTEMPT to check. The internal define-op-census established the define lane's SUBSTRATE is 0.7710 live and ready; this census is the actual κ_B BREADTH MEASUREMENT for that lane over external items — the leg-3 census the internal record named as its own necessary successor (stub b-cov-define-slice).
efficiency_thesis_breadth_read.what_0p0000_establishes: [MEASURED, in scope] The define-op's current external-benchmark BREADTH is κ_B^engine = 0.0000 on this 7-benchmark, 1,550-item biomedical-skewed Tier-A slice. This converts 'what fraction of external definitional-benchmark items can the define lane attempt?' from projected to MEASURED-zero AT THIS SUBSTRATE + MAPPER STATE. It is a MEASURED bound on efficiency-thesis breadth for the define lane: the substrate being 0.7710 live buys NO external breadth until the leg-3 template-shape gap (and, secondarily, the endorsement-coverage gap) is closed. It is the empirical vindication of the internal record's own does_not_license warning ('internal substrate completeness is NOT κ_B; leg 3 untouched') and of d-ext's standing ~49%-lemma-touch / 0%-checkability datum.
efficiency_thesis_breadth_read.informs_not_gates: [STIPULATED: ASM-0222, load_bearing:false] This is an EXPLORATORY, biomedical-skewed slice (WiC — the general-vocabulary benchmark — is a data gap, not run). The 0.0000 INFORMS the efficiency-thesis breadth story (the define lane's external breadth is currently ~0, and WHY, with two named routes) but does NOT GATE the feasibility verdict: feasibility-synthesis.md §4 rests the efficiency bottom line (ALIVE-NARROW) on de-confounding f2b (human f2b-transfer / K-NULL) and the correctness bottom line (UNDETERMINED) on the NL boundary (l3a-parse/a5-nl) + the g2/g3/g8/g9 semantics core — NONE of which this census touches. This datum characterises a breadth surface a future measurement would draw on; it moves neither verdict.

licenses: [MEASURED-exploratory] External define-lane breadth is MEASURED at κ_B^engine = 0.0000 (0/1,550) across 7 runnable Tier-A definitional benchmarks — the FIRST direct measurement of the define-op's external item-checkability (leg 3), the quantity the internal 0.7710 census could not touch. It supplies the external endpoint of the coverage gradient.

[MEASURED-exploratory] The 0.0000 is NOT an engine failure: the positive control PASSED (define stem → §C5 n==1 → DEFINE-MATCH True), and §C5's 0/0/0 breakdown shows the shortfall is UPSTREAM of the uniqueness filter — at leg 3 (parse) and leg 2 (endorsement licence), not at the engine or the collision filter. The pipeline yields a checkable when one exists; there simply are ~none in these benchmarks at this mapper/substrate state.

[MEASURED-exploratory] The shortfall decomposes into two separately-named, separately-fixable gaps: a DOMINANT template-shape gap (1,497/1,550 no-template; leg-3 mapper, records-only fix) and a structural endorsement-coverage gap (CL/UBERON/PO/PATO/CHEBI minted-but-un-endorsed; leg-2 governance fix). Diagnosed mechanically, each with a named resolution path.

[READ, efficiency breadth] For the efficiency thesis this is the MEASURED breadth-zero counterpart to the substrate-ready 0.7710: substrate readiness did not translate to external breadth, exactly as the three-legs discipline predicted. It banks 'the define lane's external κ_B is currently ~0 on the biomedical Tier-A slice, and the binding gap is leg-3 template shape' — an honest, actionable breadth bound, not a mechanism kill.
does_not_license: [NOT an engine/mechanism kill] The 0.0000 does NOT license 'the define-op is broken' or 'the define-op cannot check external items in principle'. The positive control PASSED; the mechanism works when a define-shaped, substrate-resolving item is presented. It is a coverage/reachability bound at the current mapper + endorsement state, with two named routes to move it, NOT an engine defect.

[NOT a general-benchmark claim] This is a biomedical-skewed, exploratory slice (OpenBookQA + 6 def-MMLU biomedical subjects). It does NOT establish κ_B = 0 on general/lexical benchmarks: WiC (general-vocabulary) is UNMEASURED (401 data gap). Per design memo §4 the general-benchmark yield 'may be small or ~0' — projected, not measured. The 0.0000 must always be quoted with its 7-benchmark / 1,550-item / biomedical-skew / WiC-absent envelope.

[NOT a post-fix prediction] The 0.0000 does NOT license any specific POSITIVE κ_B after template expansion + endorsing CL/UBERON/PO/PATO/CHEBI. That direction is EXTRAPOLATION [ASM-0221, load_bearing:false]: the gaps are named but the magnitude of any lift is UNMEASURED and could remain small or ~0 (WiC general-vocab; def-MMLU largely non-biomedical). Resolution = re-run the census after the two fixes.

[DOES-NOT-GATE] The 0.0000 does NOT gate the feasibility verdict [ASM-0222]. feasibility-synthesis.md §4 rests the efficiency bottom line on de-confounding f2b + K-NULL and the correctness bottom line on the NL boundary + the g2/g3/g8/g9 semantics core — none touched here. This census informs the breadth-substrate picture and moves neither verdict.

[NOT a WiC zero] WiC is a DATA GAP (pilehvar/wic HTTP-401; programme fail-closed sourcing declined an unauthenticated mirror), reported as unmeasurable, NOT as a zero. The 1,550-item denominator is the 7 RUNNABLE benchmarks; WiC is outside it.

[NOT an end-task claim] No accuracy, no baseline, no null, no model, no host is in this census. It measures item-checkability (breadth), not whether the define-op helps any task; any grounding/efficiency end-task claim lives in the f2-line / N1-LB, not here.
interpretation.expected_pattern_read: YES — the DOWNSIDE of an on-trajectory pattern. The design memo §4 pre-declared the WiC/def-MMLU κ_B yield 'a projection, not a measured quantity … may be small or ~0' [ASM-0019] and named the CL/UBERON endorsement as the precondition for the anatomy yield; the internal 0.7710 census's does_not_license section pre-declared that internal completeness is NOT κ_B and that leg 3 was untouched. Both predictions held: leg 3 (template shape) is where the mechanism dies, and the endorsement-coverage boundary is exactly the CL/UBERON gap the memo named. The magnitude (all-seven-zero, dominated by no-template rather than by the anticipated domain-skew) is the one datum the projection under-weighted — the template-shape gap swamps the domain-coverage gap on standard MCQ stems.

trajectory_read.external_kappa_b_define: [EXTRAPOLATION, direction only — ASM-0221] Upward from 0.0000 IF the mapper's define-templates are expanded to fit benchmark stems (closes the dominant gap a) AND CL/UBERON/PO/PATO/CHEBI are endorsed (closes gap b). Direction named, magnitude UNMEASURED and possibly still small/~0 (WiC general-vocab; def-MMLU largely non-biomedical). Re-run poc/b-cov-define-lane/census.py after each fix to MEASURE the delta; gold-parse and mapper-parse counted separately.
trajectory_read.what_this_census_unlocks: [READ] It closes the internal record's stub b-cov-define-slice with a MEASURED external endpoint and re-prioritises: the next informative move for define-lane breadth is NOT more internal counting (0.7710 already banked) and NOT endorsing more shards first — it is the leg-3 MAPPER TEMPLATE EXPANSION, because the parse histogram shows that gap dominates. WiC remains blocked on the data unblock (boundary-stop).

forks_resolved.fork: is the external define-lane 0.0000 an engine/harness failure or a real coverage null?
forks_resolved.resolution: REAL null — positive control PASS (define stem → §C5 n==1 → DEFINE-MATCH True); §C5 0/0/0 shows the shortfall is upstream of the collision filter, at legs 3+2; 0 instrument disagreements. The 0.0000 is the measured absence of define-shaped, substrate-resolving benchmark items, not a broken instrument.

forks_resolved.fork: is the shortfall a template-shape (leg-3) gap or an endorsement-coverage (leg-2) gap?
forks_resolved.resolution: BOTH, kept separate — template-shape DOMINATES (1,497/1,550 no-template; population never reaches the endorsement/§C5 stage), endorsement-coverage is a real but SECONDARY structural boundary (CL/UBERON/PO/PATO/CHEBI un-endorsed). Different legs, different fixes; closing (b) alone moves nothing until (a) is closed.

forks_resolved.fork: does the internal 0.7710 substrate readiness translate to external breadth?
forks_resolved.resolution: NO — the SAME op/substrate is 0.7710 internal, 0.0000 external. Substrate completeness (legs 1-2) is necessary-not-sufficient; the binding third leg is where breadth is decided. The measured 0.7710→0.0000 fall is the empirical form of the three-legs discipline.

forks_resolved.fork: does the 0.0000 gate the feasibility verdict?
forks_resolved.resolution: NO — exploratory biomedical-skewed slice; it INFORMS the efficiency-thesis breadth story but the feasibility bottom lines rest on de-confounding f2b + the NL boundary + the semantics core, none touched here (feasibility-synthesis.md §4).

questions_opened.question: DESIGN + INSTRUMENT: expand the mapper's closed define-templates (defineTemplates.ts / parseDefineQuestion) to recognise benchmark-shaped definitional stems (MCQ/cloze), then re-run poc/b-cov-define-lane/census.py to MEASURE the leg-3 recovery. This is the DOMINANT gap (1,497/1,550 no-template) and the single highest-leverage move for external define-lane breadth. A Fable design call.

GOVERNANCE + INSTRUMENT: author definitional endorsements for the minted-but-un-endorsed CL/UBERON/PO/PATO/CHEBI shards (the anatomy/cell/chemistry licence gap), pending the endorsement subject-convention pin (__PENDING_FABLE_SUBJECT_PIN__), then re-run the census. SECONDARY to the template expansion (population is suppressed at leg 3 first).

MAINTAINER/DATA: the WiC κ_B^engine cell is unmeasurable (pilehvar/wic HTTP-401; programme fail-closed sourcing declined an unauthenticated mirror). Unblock = EITHER an HF credential for pilehvar/wic OR a maintainer/Fable decision to accept a specific pinned mirror (e.g. super_glue config wic) as the exploratory source. Until then WiC is reported as a gap, not a zero.

_questions_note: est_cost_usd / est_agent_days are STIPULATED dry-plan estimates, never measurements. All three are Tier-0 CPU-only. b-cov-define-template-expansion is the highest-leverage; b-cov-define-endorse-obo-anatomy is a governance act gated on the subject-convention pin; b-cov-wic-data-unblock is a maintainer/data-access decision above the runner remit.

ledger_updates.statement: External define-lane define-checkability κ_B^engine = 0.0000 (0/1,550) on all 7 runnable Tier-A definitional benchmarks (OpenBookQA-test 500 + def-MMLU biomedical 6-subject 1,050). Parse histogram: 1,497 no-template, 52 slot-unresolved, 1 define-retrieve (→ ERR_NO_DEFINITION). §C5 breakdown 0/0/0 on every benchmark (shortfall is upstream of the uniqueness filter). Positive control PASS; 0 instrument disagreements. MEASURED-exploratory, biomedical-skewed, WiC absent.
ledger_updates.scope: define-op over endorsed {go,so,mondo} (go 9d661d25 / so 10fae0e4 / mondo b9d20d63); define-index 49159695…; mapper parseDefineQuestion at this pin; EXTERNAL benchmark items (leg 3), NOT self-authored substrate

ledger_updates.statement: The 0.0000 is the EXTERNAL-BENCHMARK endpoint of the coverage gradient: the SAME define-op / SAME substrate measured 0.7710 internal (define-op-census, legs 1-2) and 0.0000 external (this census, leg 3 attached). The ~4-order fall occurs entirely at the binding third leg + the endorsement-coverage boundary — the empirical form of the three-legs discipline; internal completeness provably bounds no external point, and the external point is now directly measured at ~0.
ledger_updates.scope: coverage gradient; the two points are separate MEASURED quantities on separate corpora (self-authored substrate vs external benchmark items)

ledger_updates.statement: This census gives NO end-task grounding/efficiency win and does NOT gate the feasibility verdict: it measures external item-checkability (breadth), not task usefulness. The 0.0000 is a MEASURED bound on efficiency-thesis BREADTH for the define lane on a biomedical-skewed exploratory slice; it INFORMS but does not move the efficiency (ALIVE-NARROW) or correctness (UNDETERMINED) bottom lines, whose deciders (f2b de-confound / K-NULL; NL boundary; g2/g3/g8/g9) this census does not touch. d-ext's ~49%-lemma-touch / 0%-checkability warning is empirically reconfirmed: substrate coverage ≠ item checkability.
ledger_updates.scope: N1-LB κ_B (define lane); efficiency-thesis breadth; feasibility verdict (feasibility-synthesis.md §4)

assumptions_resolved.backing_ref: STIPULATED framing device registered this pass (registry/assumptions.jsonl): the coverage gradient — now with a MEASURED external endpoint — remains cross-instrument, non-commensurable, load_bearing:false; used only for placement of 0.0000 + the negative/monotone inference. Extends ASM-0090.

EXTRAPOLATION registered this pass (load_bearing:false): template expansion + endorsing CL/UBERON/PO/PATO/CHEBI would raise external κ_B above 0.0000; direction named, magnitude unmeasured (possibly still small/~0); resolution_path = re-run census.py after each fix. Never a premise; does not gate the feasibility verdict.

STIPULATED envelope registered this pass (load_bearing:false): the 0.0000 is an exploratory, biomedical-skewed slice that informs the efficiency-thesis breadth story but does not gate the feasibility verdict; WiC unmeasured.

docs/design-kot-query-define-op.md §4 EXTRAPOLATION ('WiC/def-MMLU define-checkable yield may be small or ~0', resolution_path = the b-cov census). This census IS that resolution for the RUNNABLE subset: the projected downside is MEASURED at 0.0000 on the biomedical Tier-A slice; WiC itself remains unmeasured (data gap), so ASM-0019's WiC clause stays open.

§C5 uniqueness filter (n==1 checkable / n≥2 dropped) applied as designed; breakdown 0/0/0 on every benchmark (no candidate-bearing population reached §C5). Positive control confirms §C5 n==1 ⟺ DEFINE-MATCH True. The filter behaved exactly as specified; it dropped nothing because nothing reached it.

endorsement subject convention (minted corpus-marker URN) — the endorsement-coverage gap's fix (endorsing CL/UBERON/PO/PATO/CHEBI) is gated on this still-unpinned convention (__PENDING_FABLE_SUBJECT_PIN__); a design/governance decision, not resolved here.

boundary_stops.reason: Canonical source returns HTTP-401 unauthenticated; programme fail-closed sourcing (data/d-ext/manifest.json) already declined substituting an unauthenticated mirror to preserve provenance. Unblock = an HF credential for pilehvar/wic OR a maintainer/Fable decision to accept a specific pinned mirror. The WiC κ_B cell is unmeasurable until then — reported as a gap, not a zero. Not improvised here.

boundary_stops.item: Mapper define-template expansion (the dominant leg-3 gap)
boundary_stops.reason: Recognising benchmark-shaped definitional stems requires expanding defineTemplates.ts / parseDefineQuestion — a Fable design call, not a runner action. It is the single highest-leverage move for external define-lane breadth (1,497/1,550 no-template).

boundary_stops.item: CL/UBERON/PO/PATO/CHEBI definitional endorsement (the leg-2 coverage gap)
boundary_stops.reason: Authoring endorsements for the minted-but-un-endorsed anatomy/cell/plant/quality/chemistry shards is a governance act gated on the still-unpinned endorsement subject convention (ASM-0130, __PENDING_FABLE_SUBJECT_PIN__). A design/maintainer pin, not improvised here.

boundary_stops.item: Appending the fable_interpretive_assessed update to registry/audit-status.jsonl for bead kernel-of-truth-hu10
boundary_stops.reason: Shared append-only file under central custody; the exact line is reported to the coordinator for serial append, not written here.

tree_impact: genus-differentia define-op EXTERNAL κ_B breadth lane (leg-3 b-cov census): MEASURED-exploratory at κ_B^engine = 0.0000 (0/1,550) on the 7 runnable Tier-A definitional benchmarks — the external-benchmark endpoint of the coverage gradient (self-authored ~1.0 / internal 0.7710 → external 0.0000). Mechanism ALIVE (positive control PASS; NOT an engine failure): the shortfall is two separately-named leg-3/leg-2 gaps — a DOMINANT template-shape gap (mapper templates don't fit benchmark stems; 1,497/1,550 no-template) and a structural endorsement-coverage gap (CL/UBERON/PO/PATO/CHEBI minted-but-un-endorsed) — each with a named resolution path (template expansion; endorsement). EFFICIENCY-thesis BREADTH: this is the MEASURED breadth-zero counterpart to the substrate-ready 0.7710 — substrate readiness did NOT translate to external breadth, exactly as the three-legs discipline predicted; it INFORMS without gating the feasibility verdict.
